name: ASRock X870E TAICHI OCF ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8400+(OC) - 6x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C with DP-Alt - HDMI 2.1 - 5GbE LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (X870E TAICHI OCF)

description: Premium AM5 ATX motherboard with dual PCIe 5.0 x16 slots, 6 M.2 slots, and Wi-Fi 7 for high-performance systems.
